pairs.key: Hold this key to keep the chat open.

pairs.value: 在游戏启动时将假设的市长设置为禁用。

Add more debug information to the beacon solver.

pairs.key: Select the nearest node to be active. Double press to unselect.
pairs.value: 选择最近的节点作为活动节点。双击取消选择。

pairs.value: 选择离您视线最近的节点。

pairs.value: 将最近的节点与活动节点连接。如果节点已连接，则移除连接。

pairs.key: Exit out of stuff. If nothing active disables the graph editor.
pairs.value: 退出。如果没有任何活动，则禁用图形编辑器。

pairs.key: While holding the Key, edit the position of the active node or the selection block with the minecraft movement controls.

pairs.key: Dissolve the active node into one edge if it only has two edges.
pairs.value: 如果活动节点只有两条边，则将其溶解为一条边。

pairs.key: Cycles the direction of the edge that is between the active and the closed node. (Used to make one-directional ways)

pairs.key: Only render nodes below this distance to the player.

Update the NEU repository on every startup and try to auto fix bugs.

Update the repository on every startup and try to auto fix bugs.

pairs.key: Highlight levers, chests, and Wither Essence when clicked in Dungeons.

pairs.key: Show the current milestone in Dungeons.
pairs.value: 在迷宫（Dungeons）中显示当前里程碑。

pairs.key: Display the total amount of deaths in the current Dungeon.
pairs.value: 显示当前迷宫（Dungeon）中的总死亡次数。

pairs.key: Hide damage splashes while inside the boss room (fixes a Skytils feature).
pairs.value: 在Boss房间内隐藏伤害溅射效果（修复Skytils功能）。

pairs.key: Highlight Deathmites in Dungeons in red color.

Notifies you to use the Architect in Dungeons when a puzzle is failed.

在迷宫中谜题失败时通知你使用建筑师（Architect）。

高亮迷宫中的各种物体。
隐藏迷宫中的各种物体。

pairs.key: Add a visual highlight to the Croesus inventory that shows unopened chests.

pairs.key: Notifies you when a Shadow Assassin is about to jump on you.

pairs.key:
Show the optimal speed for your current tool in the hand.
(Thanks §bMelonKingDE §7for the default values).
pairs.value:
显示您手持的当前工具的最佳速度。
（感谢 §bMelonKingDE §7 提供的默认值）。

pairs.key: Warn via title and chat message when you don't have the optimal speed.
pairs.value: 当您没有达到最佳速度时，通过标题和聊天消息发出警告。

pairs.key: Only send a warning when wearing Rancher's Boots.
pairs.value: 仅在穿着牧场主靴子时发送警告。

pairs.key: Set the optimal speed in the Rancher Boots overlay by clicking on the presets.
pairs.value: 在牧场主靴子叠加层中，通过点击预设来设置最佳速度。

pairs.key: Compact the Rancher Boots GUI only showing crop icons
pairs.value: 压缩牧场主靴子 GUI，仅显示作物图标

pairs.key: Change the exact speed for every single crop.
pairs.value: 更改每种作物的确切速度。

pairs.key: Group pests that expire within this many seconds together.
pairs.value: 将在这么多秒内过期的害虫分组在一起。

pairs.key: Show a display with all known pest locations.
pairs.value: 显示包含所有已知害虫位置的显示。

pairs.key: Mark infested plots in the world.
pairs.value: 在世界中标记受感染的地块。

pairs.key: Choose how to show infested plots in the world.
pairs.value: 选择如何在世界中显示受感染的地块。

pairs.key: Change when the pest display and plot markers should be visible in the Garden.
pairs.value: 更改在花园中何时应显示害虫显示和地块标记。

pairs.key: How many seconds the plot borders should remain visible for after switching away from the item(s) specified in 'When To Show'.
pairs.value: 在切换离开“显示时机”中指定的物品后，地块边界应保持可见多少秒。

pairs.key: Show a Title in case of No pests. Useful if you are using the §eGarden Pest Chat Filter
pairs.value: 在无害虫时显示标题。如果您正在使用 §e花园害虫聊天过滤器 §7 则很有用。

pairs.key: Press this key to warp to the nearest plot with pests on it.
pairs.value: 按下此键传送到最近的有害虫的地块。

pairs.key: Allow teleporting with the Teleport Hotkey even when you're already in an infested plot.
pairs.value: 即使您已经在受感染的地块中，也允许使用传送热键传送。

pairs.key: Make the Teleport Hotkey warp you to Garden if you don't have any pests.
pairs.value: 如果您没有任何害虫，则使传送热键将您传送到花园。

pairs.key: Enable the Pesthunter Shop Profit display.
pairs.value: 启用 Pesthunter 商店利润显示。

pairs.key: Count all items you pick up when killing pests.
pairs.value: 统计您在击杀害虫时捡到的所有物品。
隐藏常规害虫掉落消息。

pairs.key:
Only show the time display when holding the specified items.
Leave empty to always show.
pairs.value:
仅在手持指定物品时显示时间显示。
留空以始终显示。
农耕时隐藏利润追踪器。

pairs.key: Time displayed after killing a pest.
pairs.value: 击杀害虫后显示的时间。

pairs.key: Add bits gained from killing pests to the tracker.
pairs.value: 将击杀害虫获得的 Bits 添加到追踪器。
每个 Bits 的硬币价值

pairs.key: Set how much bits gained from killing pests are worth.
pairs.value: 设置击杀害虫获得的 Bits 价值。

pairs.key: Mute the pest vacuum when using its right click ability.
pairs.value: 使用害虫吸尘器的右键技能时将其静音。

pairs.key: Displays your bonus pest chance and if it is enabled or not.
pairs.value: 显示您的额外害虫几率以及它是否启用。

pairs.key: Change how the pest spawn chat message should be formatted.
pairs.value: 更改害虫生成聊天消息的格式。

pairs.key: Show a Title when a pest spawns.
pairs.value: 当害虫生成时显示标题。

pairs.key: Mute or replace the default spawn sound with a custom one.
pairs.value: 静音或用自定义声音替换默认的生成声音。

pairs.key: The sound played for the notification.
The pitch of the notification sound.
Change how often the sound should be repeated in milliseconds.
pairs.value: 更改声音重复的频率（以毫秒为单位）。

pairs.key: Change the amount of times the sound should be repeated.
pairs.value: 更改声音应重复的次数。

pairs.key: Show the time since the last pest spawned in your garden.
pairs.value: 显示自上一个害虫在您的花园中生成以来的时间。

pairs.key:
Only show the time display when holding the specified items.
Leave empty to always show.
pairs.value:
仅在手持指定物品时显示时间显示。
留空以始终显示。

pairs.key: Drag text to change the appearance of the overlay.
pairs.value: 拖拽文本以更改叠加层的外观。

pairs.key: Warn when pests are eligible to spawn.
pairs.value: 当害虫可以生成时发出警告。

pairs.key: Repeat the warning sound and title until wardrobe is opened or pest cooldown is over.
pairs.value: 重复警告声音和标题，直到打开衣柜或害虫冷却结束。

pairs.key: Warn this many seconds before the cooldown is over.
pairs.value: 在冷却结束前这么多秒发出警告。

pairs.key: Set pest cooldown to a custom time after a pest spawns. Useful for equipment swapping.
pairs.value: 在害虫生成后，将害虫冷却设置为自定义时间。对装备切换有用。

pairs.key: Set pest cooldown to this amount after a pest spawns.
pairs.value: 在害虫生成后，将害虫冷却设置为这个数值。

pairs.key: Set pest cooldown to this amount after a pest spawns when Finnegan's "Pest Eradicator" perk is active.
pairs.value: 当 Finnegan 的“害虫根除者”特权激活时，在害虫生成后将害虫冷却设置为这个数值。

pairs.key: Don't include spawn time in average spawn time display when the player goes AFK for at least this many seconds.
pairs.value: 当玩家 AFK 至少这么多秒时，不在平均生成时间显示中包含生成时间。
害虫生成时间聊天消息

pairs.key: When a pest spawns, send the time it took to spawn it in chat.
pairs.value: 当害虫生成时，在聊天中发送生成它所需的时间。

pairs.key: The sound played for the notification.
The pitch of the notification sound.
Change how often the sound should be repeated in ticks. Change to 20 for only once per second.
pairs.value: 更改声音重复的频率（以 tick 为单位）。更改为 20 表示每秒一次。

pairs.key:
Display the status of pest traps in a GUI element.
Will take you to Tab Widget Display to enable.
pairs.value:
在 GUI 元素中显示害虫陷阱的状态。
将带您到 Tab Widget Display 以启用。

pairs.key: Release all pests in a pest trap when you press this keybind.
pairs.value: 当您按下此键位绑定时，释放害虫陷阱中的所有害虫。

pairs.key: How the warning message should display

The sound that plays for a warning.
Clear to disable sound.
pairs.value:
为警告播放的声音。
清空以禁用声音。

pairs.key: Reminder interval for messages in seconds.
Show a waypoint of the next pest when using a vacuum. Uses the particles and math to detect the location from everywhere in the garden.
pairs.value: 使用吸尘器时显示下一个害虫的路径点。使用粒子和数学从花园的任何地方检测位置。

pairs.key: Hide the particles of the ability.
Draw a line to the waypoint.
Distinguish pest guesses that point to the middle of the plot from actual pest locations.
pairs.value: 区分指向地块中心的害虫猜测与实际害虫位置。

pairs.key: The waypoint will disappear after this number of seconds.
pairs.value: 路径点将在这么多秒后消失。

pairs.key: Show the pests that are attracted when changing the selected material of the §aSprayonator§7.
pairs.value: 更改 §aSprayonator§7 的选定材料时显示会吸引的害虫。

pairs.key: Draw plots border when holding the Sprayonator.
pairs.value: 手持 Sprayonator 时绘制地块边界。

pairs.key: Show the active spray and duration for your current plot.
pairs.value: 显示当前地块的激活喷雾和持续时间。

pairs.key: Also show if current plot is not sprayed.
pairs.value: 如果当前地块未喷雾，也显示。

pairs.key: Show a notification in chat when a spray runs out in any plot. Only active in Garden.
pairs.value: 当任何地块的喷雾用完时，在聊天中显示通知。仅在花园中有效。

pairs.key: Send a message in chat if a new spray is detected when entering a plot.
pairs.value: 如果进入地块时检测到新喷雾，则在聊天中发送消息。

pairs.key: Show a display of what pest is being boosted by your vinyl.
pairs.value: 显示您的唱片正在增强哪种害虫。

pairs.key: Show the display even while not farming.
pairs.value: 即使不在农耕时也显示。

pairs.key: Show the head of the pest being boosted.
pairs.value: 显示被增强的害虫的头部。

pairs.key: Show the icon of the crops dropped by the pests being boosted.
pairs.value: 显示被增强的害虫掉落的作物的图标。

pairs.key: Show pest crops instead of music discs in the selector menu.
pairs.value: 在选择器菜单中显示害虫作物而不是音乐唱片。

pairs.key: Tally statistics about visitors and the rewards you have received from them.
pairs.value: 统计访客及其奖励的统计数据。

pairs.key: Drag text to change the appearance of the overlay.
pairs.value: 拖拽文本以更改叠加层的外观。

pairs.key:
Whether the number or drop name displays first.
§eNote: Will not update the preview above!
pairs.value:
数字还是掉落名称先显示。

Replace the drop names with icons.

pairs.value:
用图标替换掉落名称。
§e注意：不会更新上面的预览！

pairs.value: 仅在谷仓地块上显示叠加层。

pairs.key: Send a chat message once you talk to a visitor with a reward.
pairs.value: 一旦您与有奖励的访客交谈，发送聊天消息。

pairs.key: Show the reward name above the visitor name.
pairs.value: 在访客名称上方显示奖励名称。

pairs.key: Prevent refusing visitors with a reward.
pairs.value: 阻止拒绝有奖励的访客。

pairs.key: Hold this key to bypass the Prevent Refusing feature.
pairs.value: 按住此键绕过“阻止拒绝”功能。

pairs.key: Warn for these reward item visitor drops.

pairs.key:
The price to use for the options below.
Requires at least one of them to be on.
pairs.value:
用于以下选项的价格。
需要至少其中一项开启。

pairs.key: Prevent refusing visitors with a coins per copper lower than the set value.
pairs.value: 阻止拒绝每个铜币价值低于设定值的访客。

pairs.key: Prevent accepting visitors with a coins per copper higher than the set value.
pairs.value: 阻止接受每个铜币价值高于设定值的访客。

pairs.key:
The price to use for the below options.
Requires one of the below options to be on.
Above options take precedence.
pairs.value:
用于以下选项的价格。
需要以下选项之一开启。
以上选项优先。

pairs.key: Prevent refusing a visitor with a net loss lower than a certain value.
pairs.value: 阻止拒绝净损失低于特定值的访客。

pairs.key: Prevent accepting a visitor with a net loss higher than a certain value.
pairs.value: 阻止接受净损失高于特定值的访客。

pairs.key:
Prevents refusing a visitor you've never completed an offer with.
§eDisabled while on bingo.
pairs.value:
阻止拒绝您从未完成过交易的访客。
§e在宾果期间禁用。

pairs.key: How transparent the offer buttons should be when blocked.
pairs.value: 被阻止时，交易按钮的透明度。

pairs.key: Add a red/green line around the best offer buttons.
pairs.value: 在最佳交易按钮周围添加红色/绿色线条。

pairs.key: Show all items required for the visitors.
pairs.value: 显示访客所需的所有物品。

pairs.key: Only show the shopping list when close to the visitors.
pairs.value: 仅在接近访客时显示购物清单。

pairs.key:
Show the Visitor Items List while inside the Bazaar Alley in the Hub.
§eHelps in buying the correct amount when not having a §6Booster Cookie §ebuff active.
pairs.value:
在枢纽的集市小巷内时显示访客物品列表。
§e帮助在没有 §6Booster Cookie §e 增益激活时购买正确的数量。

pairs.key:
Show the Visitor Shopping List while on the Farming Islands or inside the Farm in the Hub.
§eHelps in farming the correct amount, especially when in the early game.
pairs.value:
在农耕岛屿或枢纽的农场内时显示访客购物清单。
§e帮助农耕正确的数量，尤其是在游戏早期。

pairs.key: Show the coin price in the shopping list.
pairs.value: 在购物清单中显示硬币价格。

pairs.key:
Show the amount of this item that you already have in your sacks.
§eOnly updates on sack change messages.
pairs.value:
显示您背包中已拥有的此物品数量。
§e仅在背包变化消息时更新。

pairs.key: Show super craft button if there are enough materials to make in the sack.
pairs.value: 如果背包中有足够的材料制作，则显示超级制作按钮。

pairs.key:
Show the base type for the required items next to new visitors.
§cNote that some visitors may require any crop.
pairs.value:
在新访客旁边显示所需物品的基础类型。
§c注意，某些访客可能需要任何作物。

pairs.key: Exclude crops requested by Spaceman from the shopping list.
pairs.value: 从购物清单中排除太空人要求的作物。

pairs.key: Timer for when the next visitor will appear, and a number for how many visitors are already waiting.
pairs.value: 下一个访客出现的时间计时器，以及已有多少访客在等待的数量。

pairs.key:
Estimate when the sixth visitor in the queue will arrive.
§eMay be inaccurate with co-op members farming simultaneously.
pairs.value:
估计队列中的第六位访客何时到达。
§e如果有合作成员同时农耕，可能不准确。

pairs.key:
Notify when it is believed that the sixth visitor has arrived.
§eMay be inaccurate with co-op members farming simultaneously.
pairs.value:
当认为第六位访客已到达时通知。
§e如果有合作成员同时农耕，可能不准确。

pairs.key:
Ping you when you are less than 10 seconds away from getting a new visitor.
§eUseful for getting Ephemeral Gratitudes during the Great Spook event.
pairs.value:
当距离获得新访客不到 10 秒时提示您。
§e在大恐怖活动期间对获取临时感恩有用。

pairs.key: Show in chat when a new visitor is visiting your island.
pairs.value: 当有新访客访问您的岛屿时在聊天中显示。

pairs.key: Compact reward summary messages when you accept an offer.
pairs.value: 当您接受交易时压缩奖励摘要消息。

pairs.key: Show a title when a new visitor is visiting your island.
pairs.value: 当有新访客访问您的岛屿时显示标题。

pairs.key: Highlight the status for visitors with a text above or with color.
pairs.value: 通过上方的文本或颜色高亮访客的状态。

pairs.key: Hide the chat message from Hypixel that a new visitor has arrived at your garden.
pairs.value: 隐藏 Hypixel 关于新访客到达您花园的聊天消息。

pairs.key: Hide chat messages from the visitors in the garden. (Except Beth, Maeve, and Spaceman)
pairs.value: 隐藏花园中访客的聊天消息。（Beth、Maeve 和 Spaceman 除外）

pairs.key:
Accept a visitor when you press this keybind while in the visitor GUI.
§eUseful for getting Ephemeral Gratitudes during the Great Spook event.
pairs.value:
在访客 GUI 中按下此键位绑定时接受访客。
§e在大恐怖活动期间对获取临时感恩有用。
在 SkyBlock 中高亮访客

pairs.key: Highlight visitors outside of the Garden.
Prevent interacting with / unlocking Visitors to allow for Dedication Cycling.
pairs.value: 阻止与/解锁访客互动，以允许进行献身循环。

pairs.key: Show the Bazaar price of the items required for the visitors, like in NEU.
pairs.value: 显示访客所需物品的集市价格，类似于 NEU。

pairs.key: Show the exact item amount and the remaining time when farmed manually. Especially useful for Ironman.
pairs.value: 显示手动农耕时的确切物品数量和剩余时间。对铁人模式尤其有用。

pairs.key: Show the price per copper inside the visitor GUI.
pairs.value: 在访客 GUI 中显示每个铜币的价格。

pairs.key: Show the time required per copper inside the visitor GUI.
pairs.value: 在访客 GUI 中显示每个铜币所需的时间。

pairs.key: Show the price per garden experience inside the visitor GUI.
pairs.value: 在访客 GUI 中显示每个花园经验的价格。

pairs.key: Allows for moving and scaling the action bar in the SkyHanni GUI Editor.
pairs.value: 允许在 SkyHanni GUI 编辑器中移动和缩放动作栏。

pairs.key: Shows the action bar outside of SkyBlock.
pairs.value: 在 SkyBlock 外显示动作栏。

pairs.key: Allows for moving and scaling the held item tooltip in the SkyHanni GUI Editor.
pairs.value: 允许在 SkyHanni GUI 编辑器中移动和缩放手持物品工具提示。

pairs.key: Shows the held item tooltip outside of SkyBlock.
pairs.value: 在 SkyBlock 外显示手持物品工具提示。

pairs.key: Add the hotbar to the gui editor. Allows for moving and scaling of the hotbar.
pairs.value: 将快捷栏添加到 GUI 编辑器。允许移动和缩放快捷栏。

pairs.key: Enable the hotbar to be edited even outside of SkyBlock.
pairs.value: 允许即使在 SkyBlock 外也能编辑快捷栏。

pairs.key:
Show the in-game date of SkyBlock (like in Apec, §ebut with mild delays§7).
(Though this one includes the SkyBlock year!)
pairs.value:
显示 SkyBlock 的游戏内日期（类似于 Apec，§e但有轻微延迟§7）。
（尽管这个包括 SkyBlock 年份！）

pairs.key: Uses the scoreboard instead to find the current month, date, and time. Greater "accuracy", depending on who's asking.
pairs.value: 使用计分板来查找当前月份、日期和时间。更高的“准确性”，取决于询问者。

pairs.key: Show the sun or moon symbol seen on the scoreboard.
pairs.value: 显示在计分板上看到的太阳或月亮符号。

pairs.key: Show the date's ordinal suffix. Ex: (1st <-> 1, 22nd <-> 22, 23rd <-> 3, 24th <-> 24, etc.)

Change the time in seconds you would like to refresh the In-Game Date Display.
§eNOTE: If "Use Scoreboard for Date" is enabled, this setting is ignored.
pairs.value:
更改您希望刷新游戏内日期显示的时间（秒）。
§e注意：如果启用了“使用计分板作为日期”，则此设置将被忽略。

pairs.key: Show the current Legion and Bobbin' Time buff.
pairs.value: 显示当前的军团和线轴时间增益。

pairs.key: Hide the gui when you aren't wearing armor with Legion or Bobbin' on it.
pairs.value: 当您没有穿戴带有军团或线轴附魔的护甲时隐藏 GUI。

pairs.key: Change the order of appearance of the Mayor Overlay.
pairs.value: 更改市长叠加层的显示顺序。

pairs.key: Show the perks of the mayor.
Change the spacing between the UI element entries.

pairs.key: Change the spacing between the candidates.
pairs.value: 更改候选人之间的间距。

pairs.key: Enable replacing all instances of a word or phrase with another word or phrase.
pairs.value: 启用将所有单词或短语替换为另一个单词或短语。

pairs.key:
Open the menu to setup the visual words.
§eCommand: /shwords
pairs.value:
打开菜单以设置视觉文字。
§e命令：/shwords

pairs.key: Enables the gui elements for the selected widgets.
pairs.value: 为所选小部件启用 GUI 元素。

pairs.key: If the information isn't shown in the tablist it won't show anything. Use /widget to turn on the information you need.
pairs.value: 如果信息未显示在标签列表中，则不会显示任何内容。使用 /widget 打开您需要的信息。

pairs.key: Drag only one new value at time into the list, since the default locations are all the same.
pairs.value: 一次仅将一个新值拖入列表，因为默认位置都相同。

pairs.key: Enable showing the textbox while in SkyBlock.
pairs.value: 在 SkyBlock 中时启用显示文本框。

pairs.key: Only show the textbox while an inventory is open.
pairs.value: 仅在物品栏打开时显示文本框。

pairs.key:
Enter text you want to display here.
§eUse '&' as the color code character.
§eUse '\n' as the line break character.
pairs.value:
在此处输入您想要显示的文本。
§e使用 '&' 作为颜色代码字符。
§e使用 '\n' 作为换行符。

pairs.key: Allows for moving and scaling the XP bar in the SkyHanni GUI Editor.
pairs.value: 允许在 SkyHanni GUI 编辑器中移动和缩放经验条。

pairs.key: Shows the XP bar outside of SkyBlock.
pairs.value: 在 SkyBlock 外显示经验条。

pairs.key: Alignment for the scoreboard on the horizontal axis.
pairs.value: 计分板在水平轴上的对齐方式。

pairs.key: Alignment for the scoreboard on the vertical axis.
pairs.value: 计分板在垂直轴上的对齐方式。

pairs.key: Space between the border of your screen and the scoreboard.
pairs.value: 屏幕边框和计分板之间的空间。

pairs.key: Determine how the arrow amount is displayed.
pairs.value: 确定如何显示箭头数量。

pairs.key: Color the arrow amount based on the percentage.
pairs.value: 根据百分比为箭头数量着色。

pairs.key: Show a background behind the scoreboard.
pairs.value: 在计分板后面显示背景。

pairs.key: The size of the border around the background.
The smoothness of the rounded corners.
See below on how to add your own custom background.
pairs.value: 有关如何添加自定义背景，请参见下文。

pairs.key: The opacity of the custom background image.
pairs.value: 自定义背景图像的不透明度。

pairs.key: Click here to open the background creator. You can use this website to add your own image into as your Scoreboard Background.
pairs.value: 单击此处打开背景创建器。您可以使用此网站将自己的图像添加为计分板背景。

pairs.key: Show an outline around the scoreboard.
pairs.value: 在计分板周围显示轮廓。

pairs.key: Amount that the outline is blurred.
Color of the top of the outline.
Color of the bottom of the outline.
Select the stats you want to display chunked on the scoreboard.
pairs.value: 选择您想要在计分板上分块显示的统计信息。

pairs.key: The maximum amount of stats that will be displayed in one line.
pairs.value: 一行中显示的最大统计数量。

pairs.key: Show a custom scoreboard instead of the vanilla one.
pairs.value: 显示自定义计分板而不是原版计分板。

pairs.key: Drag text to change the appearance of the advanced scoreboard.
pairs.value: 拖拽文本以更改高级计分板的外观。

pairs.key: Reset the appearance of the advanced scoreboard.
pairs.value: 重置高级计分板的外观。

pairs.key:
Give a chat warning when unknown lines are found in the scoreboard.
§cReporting these in the Discord Server are very important, so we can know what lines are missing.
pairs.value:
当在计分板中发现未知行时，在聊天中发出警告。
§c在 Discord 服务器中报告这些非常重要，这样我们就能知道缺少哪些行。

pairs.key:
Hide the vanilla scoreboard while the custom scoreboard is visible.
§cMods that add their own scoreboard will not be affected by this setting!
pairs.value:
当自定义计分板可见时隐藏原版计分板。
§c添加了自己计分板的模组不会受此设置影响！

pairs.key: Show the amount you earned/lost on any Number display.
pairs.value: 在任何数字显示上显示您获得/失去的数量。

pairs.key: Use custom lines instead of the default ones.
pairs.value: 使用自定义行代替默认行。

pairs.key: Show the amount of available Bits that can still be claimed.
pairs.value: 显示仍然可以领取的可用 Bits 数量。

pairs.key: Show the maximum amount of players that can join your current island.
pairs.value: 显示可以加入您当前岛屿的最大玩家数。

pairs.key: Select how the powder display should be formatted.
Select how numbers should be formatted.
Select how numbers with their prefix and color should be formatted.
pairs.value: 选择带有前缀和颜色的数字的格式。

pairs.key: Display the current SkyBlock time in 24hr format rather than 12h Format.
pairs.value: 以 24 小时制而不是 12 小时制显示当前 SkyBlock 时间。

pairs.key: Display the exact minutes in the SkyBlock time, rather than only 10 minute increments.
pairs.value: 在 SkyBlock 时间中显示精确分钟，而不是仅 10 分钟增量。

pairs.key: Show the current date infront of the server name, like Hypixel does.
pairs.value: 在服务器名称前显示当前日期，就像 Hypixel 所做的那样。
选择您偏好的日期格式。

pairs.key: The amount of space between each line.
Will align the text to the left, center or right, while not overriding certain lines, like title or footer.
pairs.value: 将文本左对齐、居中对齐或右对齐，同时不覆盖某些行，如标题或页脚。

pairs.key: Show profile name instead of the type in the profile element.
pairs.value: 在档案元素中显示档案名称而不是类型。
切换岛屿时缓存计分板

pairs.key:
Will stop the Scoreboard from updating while switching islands.
Removes the shaking when loading data.
pairs.value:
切换岛屿时将停止计分板更新。
消除加载数据时的抖动。

pairs.key: Drag your list to select the priority of each event.
pairs.value: 拖拽您的列表以选择每个事件的优先级。

pairs.key: Reset the priority of all events.
pairs.value: 重置所有事件的优先级。

pairs.key: Show all active events in the scoreboard instead of the one with the highest priority.
pairs.value: 在计分板中显示所有活跃事件，而不是优先级最高的事件。

pairs.key: Hide lines that have no info to display, like hiding the party when not being in one.
pairs.value: 隐藏没有信息可显示的行，例如不在队伍中时隐藏队伍行。

pairs.key: Hide lines that are empty and have an empty line above them.
pairs.value: 隐藏为空且上方有空白行的行。

pairs.key: Hide empty lines at the top or bottom of the scoreboard.
pairs.value: 隐藏计分板顶部或底部的空行。

pairs.key:
Hide lines that are not relevant to the current location.
§cIt's generally not recommended to turn this off.
pairs.value:
隐藏与当前位置无关的行。
§c通常不建议关闭此选项。

pairs.key: Show your amount of Magical Power in the scoreboard.
pairs.value: 在计分板中显示您的魔力值。

pairs.key:
Only show the first # tunings.
§cDoes not work with Compact Tuning.
pairs.value:
仅显示前 # 个调校。
§c不适用于紧凑调校。

pairs.key: Show the perks of the current mayor.

pairs.value: 显示距离下一任市长的时间

pairs.key: Show the time till the next mayor is elected.
pairs.value: 显示距离选举下一任市长的时间。

pairs.key: Show the Perkpocalypse Mayor without their perks and the minister with their perk.
pairs.value: 显示没有特权的 Perkpocalypse 市长以及带有特权的部长。

pairs.key: Max number of party members to show in the party list (you are not included).
pairs.value: 队伍列表中显示的最大队伍成员数（不包括您自己）。

pairs.key:
Show the party list everywhere.
If disabled, it will only show in Dungeon Hub, Crimson Isle & Kuudra.
pairs.value:
随处显示队伍列表。
如果禁用，将仅在地牢大厅、猩红岛和库德拉中显示。

pairs.key: Show the party leader in the party list.
pairs.value: 在队伍列表中显示队伍队长。

pairs.key: Align the title in the scoreboard.

What should be displayed as the title of the scoreboard.
Use && for colors.
Use "\n" for new line.
pairs.value:
应显示为计分板标题的内容。
使用 && 表示颜色。
使用 "\n" 表示换行。

pairs.key: Use a custom title instead of the default Hypixel title.
pairs.value: 使用自定义标题代替默认的 Hypixel 标题。
在 SkyBlock 外使用自定义标题

pairs.key: Use a custom title outside of SkyBlock.
pairs.value: 在 SkyBlock 外使用自定义标题。

pairs.key: Align the footer in the scoreboard.

What should be displayed as the footer of the scoreboard.
Use && for colors.
Use "\n" for new line.
pairs.value:
应显示为计分板页脚的内容。
使用 && 表示颜色。
使用 "\n" 表示换行。

pairs.key:
What should be displayed as the footer of the scoreboard when on the Alpha Server.
Use && for colors.
Use "\n" for new line.
pairs.value:
在 Alpha 服务器上时，应显示为计分板页脚的内容。
使用 && 表示颜色。
使用 "\n" 表示换行。

pairs.key: The keybinds below must be different, and won't work if you hold both at the same time.
pairs.value: 下面的按键绑定必须不同，如果同时按住两个则无效。

pairs.key: Keybind to repeat the previous fusion.
pairs.value: 重复上一次融合的按键绑定。

pairs.key: Keybind to confirm the current fusion.
pairs.value: 确认当前融合的按键绑定。

pairs.key: Count all items you pick up while hunting.
pairs.value: 统计您在狩猎时捡到的所有物品。

pairs.key: Show the hunting tracker for a couple of seconds after hunting something.
pairs.value: 狩猎到东西后显示几秒钟的狩猎追踪器。

pairs.key: Press this key in your hunting box to track the hovered shard.
pairs.value: 在您的狩猎箱中按下此键以追踪悬停的碎片。

pairs.key:
Click this button to import a recipe from SkyShards.
You can also use §e/shimportskyshards§f.
pairs.value:
单击此按钮从 SkyShards 导入配方。
您也可以使用 §e/shimportskyshards§f。

pairs.key: Click this button to open SkyShards in the browser.
pairs.value: 单击此按钮在浏览器中打开 SkyShards。

pairs.key: Enable this to override the color selected for Ultimate enchantments from above.
pairs.value: 启用此选项以覆盖上面为终极附魔选择的颜色。

pairs.key: Select a custom color to use for Ultimate enchantments.
pairs.value: 选择用于终极附魔的自定义颜色。

pairs.key: Enable this to override the color selected for perfect level enchantments from above.
pairs.value: 启用此选项以覆盖上面为完美等级附魔选择的颜色。

pairs.key: Select a custom color to use for perfect enchantments.
pairs.value: 选择用于完美附魔的自定义颜色。

pairs.key: Enable this to override the color selected for great level enchantments from above.
pairs.value: 启用此选项以覆盖上面为极好等级附魔选择的颜色。

pairs.key: Select a custom color to use for great enchantments.
pairs.value: 选择用于极好附魔的自定义颜色。

pairs.key: Enable this to override the color selected for good level enchantments from above.
pairs.value: 启用此选项以覆盖上面为良好等级附魔选择的颜色。

pairs.key: Select a custom color to use for good enchantments.
pairs.value: 选择用于良好附魔的自定义颜色。

pairs.key: Enable this to override the color selected for poor level enchantments from above.
pairs.value: 启用此选项以覆盖上面为较差等级附魔选择的颜色。

pairs.key: Select a custom color to use for poor enchantments.
pairs.value: 选择用于较差附魔的自定义颜色。

pairs.key: Show the attribute name and level on the item.
pairs.value: 在物品上显示属性名称和等级。

pairs.key: Minimum level to show the attributes of.

Highlights Good attribute combinations.
§cNote: These are subjective and ever changing. If you
§c want to suggest changes, please do so in the discord.
pairs.value:
高亮好的属性组合。
§c注意：这些是主观且不断变化的。如果您
§c 想提出更改建议，请在 Discord 中进行。

pairs.key:
Highlights attributes that are in one of the Good Rolls
combinations for that item.
pairs.value: 高亮属于该物品的好组合之一的属性。

pairs.key: Makes it so that Good Rolls are always shown no matter the attribute level.
pairs.value: 使无论属性等级如何，始终显示好组合。

pairs.key: Highlights attributes in good rolls even if they aren't in the attributes list.
pairs.value: 即使不在属性列表中，也高亮好组合中的属性。

pairs.key: Hides attributes that are not considered good rolls.
pairs.value: 隐藏不被认为是好组合的属性。

pairs.key: Enables the attribute shard overlay that helps you find the best attributes to level up.
pairs.value: 启用属性碎片叠加层，帮助您找到最佳属性进行升级。

pairs.key: Accounts for the amount of shards you currently have held in your hunting box.
pairs.value: 计算您当前在狩猎箱中持有的碎片数量。

pairs.key: Only show the shards that are in the current inventory you have open.
pairs.value: 仅显示您打开的当前物品栏中的碎片。

pairs.key: The method used to sort the attribute shards in the overlay.
pairs.value: 用于在叠加层中对属性碎片进行排序的方法。

pairs.key: The price source used for the attribute shard overlay.
pairs.value: 用于属性碎片叠加层的价格来源。

pairs.key: Display the tier of the shard as stack size in the attribute menu.
pairs.value: 在属性菜单中将碎片的等级显示为堆叠大小。
在 §e/attributemenu§7 中高亮禁用的属性。

pairs.key: Displays the bazaar price of the shards in your hunting box.
pairs.value: 显示您狩猎箱中碎片的集市价格。

pairs.key: Highlight own items that are sold and expired.
pairs.value: 高亮自己已售出和过期的物品。

pairs.key: Highlight underbid own lowest BIN auctions that are outbid.
pairs.value: 高亮出价被超的自己的最低 BIN 拍卖。
出价被超的 BIN 物品的颜色。

pairs.key: Automatically copies the price of an item in the "Create BIN Auction" minus 1 coin into the clipboard for faster under-bidding.
pairs.value: 自动将“创建 BIN 拍卖”中物品的价格减 1 硬币复制到剪贴板，以便更快地出价被超。
复制出价被超键位绑定

pairs.key: Copy the price of the hovered item in Auction House minus 1 coin into the clipboard for easier under-bidding.
pairs.value: 将拍卖行中悬停物品的价格减 1 硬币复制到剪贴板，以便更容易出价被超。

pairs.key: Add a button to the Auction House that will open the item page in §csky.coflnet.com§7.
pairs.value: 向拍卖行添加一个按钮，该按钮将在 §csky.coflnet.com§7 中打开物品页面。

pairs.key: Send a warning when you're outbid on an auction.
pairs.value: 当您在拍卖中被出价超过时发送警告。

pairs.key:
Highlight auctions based on the difference between their estimated value and the value they are listed for.
§eThis may be very inaccurate at times and only provides an estimate.
pairs.value:
根据物品估计价值与标价之间的差异高亮拍卖。
§e有时可能非常不准确，仅提供估计。

pairs.key: What color to highlight good value items with.
pairs.value: 高亮价值好的物品的颜色。

pairs.key: What color to highlight very good value items with.
pairs.value: 高亮价值非常好的物品的颜色。

pairs.key: What color to highlight bad items with.
pairs.value: 高亮价值差的物品的颜色。

pairs.key: What color to highlight very bad items with.
pairs.value: 高亮价值非常差的物品的颜色。

pairs.key: Highlights the item you are trying to buy in the Bazaar.
pairs.value: 高亮您试图在集市中购买的物品。

pairs.key: Show visual hints inside the Bazaar Manage Order view when items are ready to pickup or outbid.
pairs.value: 当物品准备好领取或出价被超时，在集市管理订单视图中显示视觉提示。

pairs.key: Show the price difference between sell instantly and sell offer.
pairs.value: 显示即时出售和出售报价之间的价格差异。

pairs.key:
Show your progress towards the daily 15 billion coin trade limit on the bazaar.
Coins in excess of the integer limit on an individual order do not count towards the limit.
pairs.value:
显示您在集市每日 150 亿硬币交易限额方面的进度。
单个订单中超出整数限制的硬币不计入限额。

pairs.key:
Send missing items from cancelled buy orders in chat.
Click on the message to quickly order the same item and amount again.
pairs.value:
在聊天中发送取消的购买订单中缺失的物品。
单击消息可快速再次订购相同的物品和数量。

pairs.key: Add a button to the Bazaar product inventory that will open the item page in §cskyblock.bz§7.
pairs.value: 向集市产品库存添加一个按钮，该按钮将在 §cskyblock.bz§7 中打开物品页面。

pairs.key: Calculate the maximum amount of items that can be purchased from the Bazaar with the amount of coins in your purse.
pairs.value: 计算使用您钱包中的硬币数量可以从集市购买的最大物品数量。

pairs.key: In the crafting view, offer a shopping list of required materials for the craft along with a shortcut for purchasing them from the Bazaar or Auction House.
pairs.value: 在制作视图中，提供所需材料的购物清单以及从集市或拍卖行购买它们的快捷方式。
追踪您拥有/需要的蛋糕。

pairs.key: Show the prices of cakes when hovering over them in the tracker.
pairs.value: 在追踪器中悬停蛋糕时显示其价格。

pairs.key: The color that should be used to highlight unobtained cakes in the Auction House.
pairs.value: 用于在拍卖行中高亮未获得的蛋糕的颜色。

pairs.key: The color that should be used to highlight obtained cakes in the Auction House.
pairs.value: 用于在拍卖行中高亮已获得的蛋糕的颜色。

pairs.key: Enable the feature for your own inventory.
pairs.value: 为自身物品栏启用此功能。

pairs.key: Show this display even if the Estimated Item Value is visible.
pairs.value: 即使物品估计价值可见，也显示此显示。

pairs.key: Show the item icon before name.
pairs.value: 在名称前显示物品图标。

pairs.key: Try to align everything to look nicer.
pairs.value: 尝试对齐所有内容，使其看起来更好。

pairs.key:
Reduce item name length to gain extra space on screen.
§cCalculated in pixels!
pairs.value:
减少物品名称长度以获得额外的屏幕空间。
§c以像素为单位计算！

pairs.key: Highlight slot where the item is when you hover over it in the display.
pairs.value: 在显示中悬停物品时高亮其所在槽位。

pairs.key:
Choose how many items are displayed.
All items in the chest are still counted for the total value.
pairs.value:
选择显示多少件物品。
箱子中的所有物品仍计入总价值。

pairs.key:
Hide items with value below configured amount.
Items are still counted for the total value.
pairs.value:
隐藏价值低于设定数量的物品。
物品仍计入总价值。

pairs.key: Exclude Soulbound items from being counted in total value.
pairs.value: 排除灵魂绑定物品，不计入总价值。

pairs.key: Shows a list of items that can be crafted with the items in inventory when inside the crafting menu. Click on the item to open §e/recipe§7.
pairs.value: 在制作菜单中时，显示可以使用物品栏中的物品制作的物品列表。单击物品打开 §e/recipe§7。

pairs.key: Include items from inside the sacks.
Hide vanilla items from the craftable item list.
pairs.value: 从可制作物品列表中隐藏原版物品。

pairs.key: Toggle for coloring the enchants. Turn this off if you want to use enchant parsing from other mods.
pairs.value: 切换为附魔着色。如果您想使用其他模组的附魔解析，请关闭此选项。

pairs.key: The way the enchants are formatted in the tooltip.
pairs.value: 工具提示中附魔的格式。

pairs.key:
Chroma requires a separate setting.
§eIf SkyHanni chroma is disabled Chroma will default to §6Gold.
pairs.value:
Chroma 需要一个单独的设置。
§e如果 SkyHanni chroma 被禁用，Chroma 将默认为 §6金色。

pairs.key: The color the Ultimate enchantment will be. (Will always be bold)
pairs.value: 终极附魔的颜色。（将始终为粗体）

pairs.key: The color an enchantment will be at max level.
pairs.value: 附魔在最高等级时的颜色。

pairs.key: Enchantments at max level will be bold.
pairs.value: 最高等级的附魔将加粗。

pairs.key: The color an enchantment will be at a great level.
pairs.value: 附魔在极好等级时的颜色。

pairs.key: The color an enchantment will be at a good level.
pairs.value: 附魔在良好等级时的颜色。

pairs.key: The color an enchantment will be at a poor level.
pairs.value: 附魔在较差等级时的颜色。

pairs.key: Hide the regular vanilla enchants usually found in the first 1-2 lines of lore.
pairs.value: 隐藏通常出现在前 1-2 行 lore 中的常规原版附魔。

pairs.key: Hide the enchant description after each enchant if available.
pairs.value: 如果可用，隐藏每个附魔后的附魔描述。

pairs.key: Get notified if you rejoin a server within the specified number of seconds.
pairs.value: 如果您在指定秒数内重新加入服务器，则收到通知。

pairs.value: 允许运行 §e/shlastopened §7 作为命令来打开您最后打开的存储。也允许 §e/ec - §7 和 §e/bp - §7 打开您最后打开的末影箱和背包。

pairs.key: What command to run when no last Ender Chest or Backpack is found.
pairs.value: 当未找到最后打开的末影箱或背包时，要运行的命令。

pairs.key: Display the active potion effects that are not part of the God Pot.
pairs.value: 显示不属于 God Pot 的活跃药水效果。

pairs.key: Include God Pot mixins in the Non God Pot Effects display.
pairs.value: 在非 God Pot 效果显示中包括 God Pot 混合药水。

pairs.key: Sends a title when one of the Non God Pot Effects is expiring.
pairs.value: 当非 God Pot 效果之一即将过期时发送标题。

pairs.key: Makes a sound when one of the Non God Pot Effects is expiring.
pairs.value: 当非 God Pot 效果之一即将过期时播放声音。

pairs.key: Change the time in seconds before the potion expries to warn you.
pairs.value: 更改在药水过期前发出警告的时间（秒）。

pairs.key: Hide particles from the fire block.
Hide particles that are more than 40 blocks away.
pairs.value: 隐藏距离超过 40 格的粒子。

pairs.key: Hide Redstone particles around the player (appear for some potion effects).
pairs.value: 隐藏玩家周围的红石粒子（某些药水效果会出现）。

pairs.key: Choose who can run party chat commands.
pairs.value: 选择谁可以运行队伍聊天命令。

pairs.key: Allow party chat commands to trigger on your own messages.
pairs.value: 允许队伍聊天命令在您自己的消息上触发。

pairs.key: Automatically transfer the party to people who type §b!ptme§7.
pairs.value: 自动将队伍转移给输入 §b!ptme§7 的人。

pairs.key: Automatically warp the party if someone types §b!warp§7.
pairs.value: 如果有人输入 §b!warp§7，自动传送队伍。

pairs.key: Automatically turn on allinvite if someone types §b!allinv§7.
pairs.value: 如果有人输入 §b!allinv§7，自动开启 allinvite。

pairs.key:
Sends current ping into Party Chat if someone types §b!ping§7.
§cNote: Will not work correctly with the Hypixel Ping API turned off in Dev.
pairs.value:
如果有人输入 §b!ping§7，将当前 ping 发送到队伍聊天。
§c注意：如果开发中关闭了 Hypixel Ping API，将无法正常工作。

pairs.key: Sends current TPS into Party Chat if someone types §b!tps§7.
pairs.value: 如果有人输入 §b!tps§7，将当前 TPS 发送到队伍聊天。

pairs.key: Show a reminder when an unauthorized player tries to run a command.
pairs.value: 当未授权的玩家尝试运行命令时显示提醒。

pairs.key: Highlight the coordinates sent by Patcher.
pairs.value: 高亮 Patcher 发送的坐标。

pairs.value: 将口袋套包应用在背包图标上的数量显示为叠加层。

Replace how text is displayed in lore.
Show §eis stitched with 2/3...
§7Instead of §eis stitched with two...
pairs.value:
替换 lore 中文本的显示方式。
显示 §e用 2/3... 缝合
§7而不是 §e用两个... 缝合

pairs.key: Add a mod list, allowing quick switching between different mod menus.

pairs.value: 提醒显示一次后自动删除。

pairs.value: 提醒显示一次后再次显示的间隔（分钟）。

pairs.value: 隐藏传送板上方的“传送到”和“无目的地”文本。

pairs.value: 在“更改目的地”物品栏中将传送板编号显示为堆叠大小。

pairs.key:
Track all of your data from doing Trevor Quests.
Shows based on the setting below.
pairs.value:
追踪您完成 Trevor 任务的所有数据。
根据以下设置显示。

pairs.key:
Show the tracker during and between quests otherwise it will only show during them.
Will show in the Trapper's Den regardless. §cToggle 'Enable Data Tracker' above.
pairs.value:
在任务期间和任务之间显示追踪器，否则仅在任务期间显示。
无论如何都会在 Trapper's Den 中显示。§c切换上面的“启用数据追踪器”。

pairs.key: Drag text to change the appearance of the overlay.
pairs.value: 拖拽文本以更改叠加层的外观。

pairs.key:
Assist in finding Trevor's mobs.
§eNote: May not always work as expected.
§cWill not help you to find rabbits or sheep in the Oasis!
pairs.value:
协助寻找 Trevor 的生物。
§e注意：可能并不总是按预期工作。
§c不会帮助您在绿洲中找到兔子或羊！

pairs.key:
Draw the radius given by Talbot's Theodolite.
The larger the height difference, the more accurate it will be.
pairs.value:
绘制 Talbot 的经纬仪给出的半径。
高度差越大，准确性越高。

pairs.key: Show a message when Trevor's mob dies.
pairs.value: 当 Trevor 的生物死亡时显示消息。

pairs.key: Warp to Trevor's Den. Works only inside the Farming Islands.
pairs.value: 传送到 Trevor 的巢穴。仅在农耕岛屿内有效。

pairs.key: Click this key after the chat prompt to accept Trevor's quest.
pairs.value: 在聊天提示后点击此键以接受 Trevor 的任务。

pairs.key: Press this key to warp to Trevor's Den or to accept the quest. §eRequires the relevant above settings to be toggled
pairs.value: 按下此键传送到 Trevor 的巢穴或接受任务。§e需要切换上述相关设置

pairs.value: 更改 Trevor 的颜色并在其头上添加冷却计时器。

pairs.value: 当冷却结束且 Trapper 准备好下一个任务时，显示标题并播放声音。

pairs.key: Show the cooldown on screen in an overlay (intended for Abiphone users).

pairs.value: 使用 SkyBlock 等级的颜色作为玩家颜色。

pairs.value: 从标签列表中隐藏限时抢购

pairs.value: 为您射出的箭矢线条设置不同的颜色。

How often the chat message updates.

如果追踪器在此秒数内未被修改，则暂停。

pairs.key: Draw lines that start from the head of the boss and end on the Killer Spring tower.
pairs.value: 绘制从首领头部开始到杀手弹簧塔结束的线条。

pairs.key: Fixes a Hypixel bug that overloads Minecraft's sound engine with Killer Spring sounds and results in no sounds for a few seconds.
pairs.value: 修复 Hypixel 的一个错误，该错误会因杀手弹簧声音而使 Minecraft 的声音引擎过载，导致几秒钟内没有声音。

pairs.key:
Highlight others players boss.
You need to hit them first.
pairs.value:
高亮其他玩家的首领。
您需要先攻击他们。

pairs.key: What color to highlight the boss in.
Show a title when you can steak the boss.
pairs.value: 当您可以使用牛排时显示标题。

pairs.key: Send a title when Twinclaws is about to happen.
pairs.value: 当双爪即将发生时发送标题。

pairs.key: Highlight your own Vampire Slayer boss.
pairs.value: 高亮您自己的吸血鬼杀手首领。

pairs.key: What color to highlight the boss in.
Show a title when you can steak your boss.
pairs.value: 当您可以使用牛排时显示标题。

pairs.key:
Send a title when Twinclaws is about to happen.
Works on others highlighted people boss.
pairs.value:
当双爪即将发生时发送标题。
对其他高亮玩家的首领也有效。

pairs.key: Choose the transparency of the color.
Change color when the boss is below 20% health.
pairs.value: 当首领生命值低于 20% 时更改颜色。

pairs.key: Color when the boss is below 20% health.
pairs.value: 当首领生命值低于 20% 时的颜色。

pairs.key: Delay the Twinclaws alert for a given amount in milliseconds.
pairs.value: 将双爪警报延迟指定的毫秒数。

pairs.key: Draw a line starting at your crosshair to the boss head.
pairs.value: 从您的准星到首领头部绘制一条线。

pairs.key: Highlight NPCs that can be placed, but aren't, in the NPC menu.
pairs.value: 在 NPC 菜单中高亮可以放置但尚未放置的 NPC。

pairs.key: Display if the player is in water.
